title: Device Settings - Headset disconnected on Settings screen
scenario: Device Settings screen does not update to show disconnected-state options when headset is disconnected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open the Device Settings screen.
4. Verify that the Device Settings screen displays options relevant to the connected headset (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, etc.).
5. While on the Device Settings screen, disconnect the headset (e.g., turn off the headset, move out of range, or disable Bluetooth on the phone).
6. Observe the Device Settings screen after the headset is disconnected.
expected: The Device Settings screen should update dynamically to show only options available while the device is disconnected (e.g., a message indicating no device connected, or limited settings like 'Connect a device'). It should no longer display connected-headset-specific settings such as ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer.
